name: Salmon Jackets
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 190°C (375°F) or Gas mark 5.
2. Drain the can of salmon and set aside.
3. Bake potatoes until soft. Cut a cross into the top of each potato. Squeeze out the base to open it and scoop out half of the pulp.
4. Place the scooped-out potato pulp in a bowl with the remaining ingredients (salmon, anchovies, mushrooms, pesto). Mix well.
5. Spoon the mixture into each potato skin, covering the cuts. Return to oven for 20 minutes.
6. Blend the remaining ingredients (tomatoes, basil, garlic) until finely chopped. Pour into a small pan and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
7. Serve each potato topped with some of the sauce.
Serves 6. Approx. 185 kcals per serving
